title: koeleria vallesiana subsp. abbreviata
intro: Koeleria vallesiana subsp. abbreviata, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Koeleria vallesiana subsp. abbreviata can be used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, but its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
